name: Self-Worth Bastion
description: A fortified position overlooking the Valley of Accomplishments. Whoever holds this controls how you value yourself.

name: Trust Bridge
description: An ancient stone span arching over the Chasm of Doubt. Cross it to bind others to your cause.

name: Gratitude Grove
description: Bioluminescent trees that glow when acknowledged. The more you visit, the brighter they shine.

name: Ambition Spire
description: A tower with no visible top, climbing into clouds of possibility. Each floor requires more courage than the last.

name: Shame Pit
description: A sinkhole that whispers every embarrassment you've ever had. Its depths are bottomless.

name: Fear Fortress
description: Walls made of 'what ifs' and moats of worst-case scenarios. The drawbridge only lowers for cowards.

name: Regret Ruins
description: Collapsed monuments to choices not taken. The ghosts here wear your face.

name: Catastrophe Citadel
description: A grim castle where tomorrow's disasters are rehearsed daily. The scriptwriters never sleep.
